extortion.description: [AI generated] The JDK Group is a full-service catering and events company based in Pennsylvania, USA. Offering a range of services like event planning, design, production, and catering, it specializes in corporate functions, weddings, social gatherings, and other large-scale events. With over 30 years of experience, the JDK Group is renowned for its commitment to quality, creativity, and high standards of customer service.
